common.errorBody: Check your connection and try again.

auth.title: Welcome to Madro
auth.subtitle: Understand the quality of what you eat
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your inbox — we sent you a login link.
auth.error: That didn't work. Check your details and try again.
auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts right now — wait a few minutes and try again.
auth.tagline: Understand your food — no guilt, no judgement.

profile.title: Profile
profile.aboutNote: Used only to calculate your energy reference. Every field is optional.
profile.goalNote: The reference is a neutral guide — not a grade. Adjustments are deliberately gentle.
profile.referenceHint: Add your birth year, height and weight if you want a reference calculated from your profile.
profile.activityNote: Optional — today's active energy is added to your energy reference. No requirements, no points.
profile.supportBody: If food and body image are taking up too much space, support organisations are there for you — in Denmark, LMS offers counselling.
profile.exportBody: Get a copy of all your data as a single JSON file.
profile.deleteBody: Delete your account and all data permanently.
profile.deleteWarning: Everything is deleted permanently and cannot be recovered: diary, scans, insights, weight history and profile. Consider downloading your data first.

design.title: Madro design system
design.subtitle: build plan §3 · tokens are the only styling source
design.footer: Temporary page — replaced when the real app shell takes over.

sections.paletteNote: Semantic colors — same utility, automatic light/dark. Hex values are read live from the CSS variables.
sections.verdictNote: Muted quality scale — never alarming, no guilt.
sections.macroNote: Protein, carbs and fat — approved in the design draft.
sections.typographyNote: Geist Sans for UI, Geist Mono with tabular-nums for all numbers.
sections.depthNote: Light: subtle layered shadows. Dark: surface lightness and hairlines instead of shadow.
sections.buttonsNote: Primary, secondary and ghost — spring on press, no scaling under reduced motion.
sections.chipsNote: Neutral chip, brand chip and VerdiktBadge in all five levels.
sections.cardsNote: Card on surface with shadow-1 · Input with visible label · pulsing Skeleton.
sections.stepperNote: Stepper with aria-live value · Radix tabs with arrow-key navigation.
sections.sheetNote: Bottom sheet with spring physics (Radix Dialog: Esc closes, focus is trapped) · toast above the tab bar. Both follow the page's active theme — use the switch at the top.
sections.appshellNote: BottomTabBar with a raised central scan button — this frame is the gallery's phone preview.

design.specimen: Understand the quality of what you eat

demo.searchHint: Searches across USDA, Frida and Open Food Facts
demo.scanToast: The scan flow arrives in Phase 1

scan.hint: Point the camera at the barcode
scan.cameraError: Camera unavailable — enter the barcode below instead
scan.lookingUpDeepBody: Not in our library yet — checking Open Food Facts and saving it for next time.
scan.missBody: We couldn't find the barcode {{barcode}}. Try searching by name instead.
scan.noResults: No results — try a different word.
scan.errorBody: We couldn't look up the barcode — check your connection.

label.title: Photograph the label
label.intro: Take a clear photo of the ingredient list and nutrition declaration — we'll fill in the product for you.
label.nothingFound: We couldn't read a label in the photo — try again with better light and the full text in frame.
label.saveError: Couldn't save the product — try again.
label.verifiedSuggest: Fill the missing values from "{{name}}" ({{source}} — verified)?
label.verifiedApplied: Missing values filled from "{{name}}" — your own numbers stay.

photo.title: Photograph the meal
photo.intro: Take a photo of the plate — we'll recognise the food and estimate portions. You can adjust everything afterwards.
photo.nothingFound: We couldn't recognise food in the photo — try again with the whole meal in frame.

verdict.insufficient: Not enough data for a verdict yet

alternatives.title: Better alternatives
alternatives.subtitle: Same category — higher quality
alternatives.loading: Finding alternatives that fit your week…
alternatives.none: This product actually holds up well in its category — we didn't find anything of higher quality.
alternatives.premiumTitle: Alternative suggestions are part of Premium
alternatives.premiumBody: Get 2-3 concrete products of higher quality, weighted by what you're missing this week.

attribution.off: Data: Open Food Facts — licensed under ODbL (opendatacommons.org).
attribution.frida: Data: Fødevaredata (FCDB v6.1, 2026), National Food Institute, DTU.

diary.title: Diary
diary.emptyHint: Scan a product or add a meal with the plus button.
diary.enriched: Nutrition filled from a verified source

enrich.hint: This food has no micronutrient values yet.
enrich.choose: Choose the closest match — your own values stay.
enrich.error: Couldn't update the food — try again.

add.title: Add meal
add.hint: Search the whole library — brands, whole foods and your own items.

write.label: Write what you ate
write.placeholder: e.g. two slices of rye bread with cheese and a banana
write.aiNotConfigured: The AI helper isn't set up yet — use search for now.
write.rateLimited: Many attempts in a short time — try again shortly.

editor.invisible: What the camera can't see — add it yourself:

today.title: Today

quality.label: not ultra-processed
quality.empty: No quality data for today's meals yet

today.insightTeaser: Weekly insights about your patterns and micronutrition are on the way.

insights.title: Insights
insights.trendNote: Share of non-ultra-processed food per day (NOVA 1-3).
insights.tooFewDays: Log a couple more days and we can draw your weekly pattern.
insights.generateHint: Get a short story about this week's patterns and concrete ideas that close the gaps.
insights.premiumTitle: Weekly insights are part of Premium
insights.premiumBody: Get a weekly story about your patterns and concrete food ideas that close your micronutrient gaps.

onboarding.welcomeBody: Understand the quality of what you eat — processing, nutrition and balance in one place. No guilt.
onboarding.ageBody: We only use the year for the age limit and your energy reference.
onboarding.tooYoungTitle: Madro isn't for you just yet
onboarding.tooYoungBody: You need to be at least 13 to use Madro. It's nothing about you — apps about food and body simply require a certain age. You're welcome back later.
onboarding.consentData: What you log about your food is sensitive health data. It is stored in the EU and used ONLY to show you your own overviews and insights — never for ads, and never sold.
onboarding.consentRights: You can download all your data or delete your account entirely at any time — both directly from your profile.
onboarding.consentNote: Consent is required for the app to work. You can withdraw it by deleting your account.
onboarding.basicsBody: Makes the references more personal — everything can be changed or skipped.
onboarding.calorieNote: Some people do best without numbers. If you hide them, the app focuses on quality and balance — and you can always change your mind in your profile.

premium.title: Premium
premium.featInsights: Weekly pattern insights with concrete food ideas
premium.featPhoto: Photo-log your meals — the plate becomes entries
premium.featText: Write what you ate — the rest happens by itself
premium.featAlternatives: Better alternatives, weighted by what YOU lack
premium.featWearables: Wearable sync (arrives with the iOS/Android app)
premium.featExport: Reports and export of your trends
premium.trialNote: We'll let you know before the trial ends — no hidden renewals.
premium.betaNote: Payments open at launch — everything else already works.
premium.freeStays: The free tier stays fully usable
premium.alreadyBody: All features are unlocked. Thanks for being here.
